title: Quantum of fees to be charged for conversion of OCI card in lieu of valid PIO card
description: Quantum of fees to be charged for conversion of OCI card in lieu of valid PIO card
text: tzmz^mi No.26011/06/2015-OCI (Vol.II) Government of India/HRcf-Hi^N M i n i s t r y o f H o m e A f f ai>s/JJF Tf3T?PT (Foreigners D i v i s i o n ) / ( f ^ O f^WW TfMTT) 1st Floor, Major Dhyan Chand N a t i o n a l S t a d i u m , India G a t e C i r c l e , N e w Delhi-110002. Dated, t h e 2 6 F e b r u a r y 2 0 1 8 . ORDER Subject: Quantum of fees to be charged for conversion of OCI card in lieu of valid PIO card The issue of quantum of fees to be charged for OCI card in lieu of valid PIO card has been examined and It has been decided to fix the fees for the conversion of OCI card in lieu of valid PIO card as Rs 5500 (USD $100). These charges will be effective for all such applicants who have filled the applications after 31.12.2017. For all applications that were submitted by the applicants online till 31.12.2017, the OCI card in lieu of valid PIO card will be on gratis basis as per this Ministry's Office Memorandum of even number dated 05.09.2017. 2. In view of the above, all Missions and FRROs may be guided to process all the applications for conversion of OCI card in lieu of valid PIO card submitted by the applicants online after 31.12.2017 at a charge of Rs-5500 (USD $100). 3. This issues with the approval of the competent authority. sn i • A C—5 cif Crt Mi I (S.C.
